holdings.infoBox: ENFR is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Enbridge stock at 8.31%, Energy Transfer LP at 7.80%, Enterprise Products Partners at 7.11%, The Williams Companies at 6.07%, and Targa Resources at 5.43%.

overview.description: The Alerian Energy Infrastructure ETF (ENFR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Alerian Midstream Energy Select index. The fund tracks an index of energy infrastructure companies in the US and Canada, weighted by market capitalization. ENFR was launched on Nov 1, 2013 and is issued by SS&C.
